channel.title: Research Radar — Daily Briefing
channel.description: Daily ~6-minute audio briefing of the autonomy-systems research radar. Generated automatically; voice is OpenAI TTS.
channel.itunes:author: Prof. Liangkai Liu
channel.itunes:summary: Daily ~6-minute audio briefing of the autonomy-systems research radar.

item.title: Research Radar — Sun May 10: Focus on AI Agent Frameworks and Interaction Datasets
item.description: Today's research highlights a surge in open-source frameworks for AI agents, emphasizing interaction and collaboration capabilities. Notably, the AgentTrove dataset offers extensive data for training agentic models.
